name: Lehman (T.H.) & Co., Inc.
summary: Lehman (T.H.) & Co., Inc. does not have significant operations. It intends to acquire or merge with other operating companies. Previously, the company, through its subsidiaries, provided medical financial services, such as accounting, marketing, management, non-medical staffing, facilities, equipment, and billing and collection of receivables in California. Lehman (T.H.) & Co., Inc. was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in Houston, Texas.
